schemes.name: Amended Technology Upgradation Fund
schemes.description: The Ministry of Textiles introduced the Amended Technology Upgradation Fund Scheme (ATUFS). This scheme aims to facilitate investment, employment, productivity, quality and import and export substitution in the textile industry.

schemes.name: Atal Beemit Vyakti Kalyan Yojana
schemes.description: The scheme âAtal Beemit Vyakti Kalyan Yojana (ABVKY)â was introduced by the Employeesâ State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) on a pilot basis for a period of 2 years w.e.f. 01.07.2018 for providing relief to the Insured Persons (IPs) who have become unemployed.

schemes.name: Atal Pension Yojana
schemes.description: Atal Pension Yojana (APY) is an old age income security scheme for a  savings account holder  in the age group of 18-40 years,  who is not an income tax-payee. It helps to address longevity risks among  workers in unorganized sector and encourages the workers to voluntarily save for retirement.

schemes.name: Bima Yojana - Direct Benefit to Artisan
schemes.description: Launched on 15th August 2022, the scheme "Bima Yojana - Direct Benefit to Artisan (BYDBTA)" is a Social Welfare Scheme by the Ministry of Textiles, Government of India.
schemes.income_limit: - The applicantâs annual income should not exceed â¹1,00,000.

schemes.name: Central Assistance For One Time Settlement Of Displaced Families From PoK And Chhamb Under Prime Minister's Development Package
schemes.description: A relief and rehabilitation scheme by the Ministry of Home Affairs provides central assistance to the displaced families from PoK And Chhamb and settled in the state of Jammu & Kashmir. The amount of Central Assistance of Rs. 5,49,692/- per family will be distributed through Direct Benefit Transfer.

schemes.name: Coconut Palm Insurance Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.description: The âCoconut Palm Insurance Scheme (CPIS)â is being implemented by the Coconut Development Board, Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare, Government of India with the objective of insuring coconut palms against natural calamities, climatic risks, pests, diseases, and other perils.

schemes.name: Credit Based Schemes For SC - Term Loan (TL)
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: A loan scheme by Ministry of Social justice and Empowerment for Entrepreneur of Scheduled Caste Category.

schemes.name: Credit Enhancement Guarantee Scheme For The Scheduled Castes
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: a loan scheme by the Ministry of Social justice and Empowerment for Entrepreneurs of Scheduled Caste Category.

schemes.name: Dr Ambedkar Central Sector Scheme of Interest Subsidy on Educational Loans for Overseas Studies for Other Backward Classes (OBCs) and Economically Backward Classes (EBCs)
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: The scheme provides interest subsidy to the students belonging to the OBCs and EBCs on the interest payable for the period of the moratorium for the Education Loans for overseas studies to pursue approved courses of studies abroad at Masters, M.Phil. and PhD level.
schemes.income_limit: The total income of the applicant (from all sources) shall not exceed â¹ 8,00,000 per annum.

schemes.name: Education Loan Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: A scheme named Education Loan Scheme by National Scheduled Castes Finance and Development Corporation (NSFDC) under the M/o Social Justice and Empowerment provides loans to students from Scheduled Castes who are pursuing full-time professional or technical courses in recognized institutions.
tags: National Scheduled Castes Finance And Development Corporation
schemes.income_limit: Individuals, Partnership Firms, and Co-operative Societies can undertake income-generating activities.

schemes.name: Education Loan Scheme (NSFDC)
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: The scheme implemented by the National Scheduled Castes Finance & Development Corporation, Ministry of Social Justice & Empowerment, Govt. of India. Under this Scheme, loan is provided for pursuing full-time Professional/Technical courses in recognized institutions as one time assistance.
schemes.income_limit: The applicant&#39;s annual family income should be less than â¹3,00,000/-, both in rural and urban areas.

schemes.name: Education Loan Scheme of NMDFC
schemes.description: Loan of upto Rs. 20 lacs for domestic courses & Rs. 30 lacs for courses abroad under Credit  Line-1 and Credit line -2 is extended to beneficiaries belong to minority communities at 3% p.a. & 8% p.a respectively.
schemes.income_limit: b) The annual family income limit is: Up to Rs.

schemes.name: Financial Assistance as Interest Subsidy on Home Loan
schemes.description: The scheme aims to provide 50% reimbursement of interest on home loans up to â¹1,00,000 for eligible war widows, war bereaved families, war disabled personnel, and attributable peacetime casualties.

schemes.name: Fund of Funds for Startups
schemes.description: Launched in January 2016 under Startup India, the Fund of Funds for Startups is managed by SIDBI. It supports DPIIT-recognized startups indirectly by investing in SEBI-registered AIFs, which must invest at least twice the FFS contribution.

schemes.name: Green Business Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: Green Business Scheme has been launched by the National Safai Karamcharis Finance and Development Corporation to provide financial assistance in the form of loans for activities that can tackle the impacts of climate change and also be income-generating.

schemes.name: Group Insurance Scheme for Powerloom Weavers
schemes.description: The basic objective of this scheme is to provide insurance cover to the powerloom weavers in the case of natural death, accidental death as well as partial and permanent disability due to accident.

schemes.name: Group Personal Accident Insurance Scheme For Coir Workers
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: A group insurance scheme by MoMSME for coir workers. The scheme provides insurance cover against accidental death and permanent disability of the insured member.

schemes.name: Indira Gandhi National Disability Pension Scheme
schemes.description: A non-contributory pension scheme to provide social security to Divyangjans aged 18 and above who belong to a poor family (BPL) in society.

schemes.name: Indira Gandhi National Widow Pension Scheme
schemes.description: A non-contributory pension scheme to provide social security to widows of poor family (BPL)  of the society.

schemes.name: International Cooperation Scheme- Market Development Assistance
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: The scheme âInternational Cooperation Schemeâ was launched by the MSME, Govt. of India with the aim to capacity build MSMEs for entering the export market by facilitating their participation in international exhibitions/fairs/conferences/seminars/buyer-seller meets abroad.

schemes.name: Jute Raw Material Bank Scheme
schemes.description: Jute Raw Material Bank Scheme (JRMB) will be set up in the local clusters across the country in collaboration with bonafide Agencies who have adequate experience in similar activities and have the required storage, display, and selling infrastructure.

schemes.name: Kera Suraksha Insurance Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.description: The âKera Suraksha Insurance Schemeâ is a comprehensive Group Personal Accident Insurance Scheme, implemented by Coconut Development Board in association with Public Insurance companies for Coconut Tree Climbers/Neera Technicians/Coconut Harvesters.

schemes.name: Khadi Karigar Janashree Bima Yojana
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: A group insurance scheme by MoMSME for khadi artisans (spinners and weavers). The scheme provides insurance cover against normal death, accidental death and disability of the insured member.

schemes.name: Kisan Vikas Patra Scheme
schemes.description: âKisan Vikas Patra Schemeâ was relaunched in the year 2014 by the Department of Economic Affairs, Ministry Of Finance, Government of India in view of the popular demand and to revitalize Small Savings. The amount invested in Kisan Vikas Patra (KYP) doubles in 115 months at the present rate.

schemes.name: Loan based Scheme for Pay and Use Community Toilets
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: The âPay and Useâ Community Toilets Scheme under Swachhta Udyami Yojana by NSKFDC offers concessional loans to Safai Karamcharis and their dependents for setting up public toilet units, promoting sanitation, livelihood, and dignity.

schemes.name: Loan Based Schemes For Safai Karamchari - Education Loan Scheme (ELS)
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: An Education Loan scheme by the Ministry of Social justice and Empowerment for Safai Karamchari, Manual Scavengers, and their dependents aged 18 years and above.

schemes.name: Loan Based Schemes For Safai Karamchari - General Term Loan (GTL)
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: A general term loan scheme by the Ministry of Social justice and Empowerment for Safai Karamchari, Manual Scavengers, and their dependants aged 18 years and above.

schemes.name: Loan Based Schemes For Safai Karamchari - Sanitary Marts Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: A  contributory Loan scheme by Ministry of Social justice and Empowerment for individual beneficiaries/self help groups of Liberated Safai Karamchari, Manual Scavengers and their dependants aged 18 years and above, for setting up A Sanitary Marts (SM) is a one-stop-shop for all things for sanitation

schemes.name: Loan Based Schemes For Safai Karamchari - Swachhta Udyami Yojana â Swachhta Se Sampannta Ki Aur
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: A general term loan scheme by the Ministry of Social justice and Empowerment for Safai Karamchari, Manual Scavengers and their dependants aged 18 years and above for procurement of sanitation-related vehicles.

schemes.name: Mahila Samman Savings Certificate
schemes.description: The scheme âMahila Samman Savings Certificateâ was launched by the Department of Economic Affairs, Ministry of Finance to provide financial security to every girl and woman in India.

schemes.name: Mahila Samriddhi Yojana
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: This is a micro-financing programme aiming towards the empowerment of women from underprivileged backgrounds or economically backward areas. Through this scheme, these women can apply for a loan at a nominal interest rate to fulfil their dreams and goals and gain financial independence.
schemes.income_limit: Applicable to Women from low-income families or women who belong to SC/ST/OBC categories as notified by the Central/State Government and whose family income is less than Rupees three lakhs per annum.

schemes.name: Micro Credit Finance (NSFDC)
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: The scheme is implemented by the National Scheduled Castes Finance & Development Corporation, Ministry of Social Justice & Empowerment, Govt. of India. Under this scheme, loans are provided to individuals from the SC community for units costing up to â¹1,40,000/- for income-generating activities.
schemes.income_limit: The applicant&#39;s annual family income should be less than â¹3,00,000/-, both in rural and urban areas w.e.f.

schemes.name: Micro Finance Scheme of NMDFC
schemes.description: Under the scheme, an amount of Rs. 1 lakh under credit Line-1 & upto  Rs. 1.5 lakh under Credit Line-2 is extended to each member of SHG (belong to Minority communities) at interest rate of 7% & 10% respectively.  Concession of 2% is extended to women beneficiaries under Credit Line-2.
schemes.income_limit: c) The annual family income of each beneficiary must not exceed: Rs.

schemes.name: Mission Solar Charkha
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: The scheme âMission Solar Charkhaâ a pilot project was implemented by the Ministry of Micro, Small & Medium Enterprises, Government of India. The scheme envisages setting up of Solar Charkha Clusters which would mean a focal village and other surrounding villages in a radius of 8 to 10 Kilometres.

schemes.name: National Handloom Development Programme: Concessional Credit/Weaver MUDRA Scheme
schemes.description: The scheme aims to provide adequate and timely assistance from the banks to the handloom sector to meet their credit requirements for term loan & working capital in a flexible and cost effective manner across the country.

schemes.name: National Pension Scheme For Traders And Self Employed Persons
schemes.description: A voluntary and contributory pension scheme by the Ministry of Labour and Employment. This scheme is meant for old age protection and social security of Small Scale Traders and Retailers. The beneficiary would receive a minimum assured pension of â¹ 3000/- per month after attaining the age of 60 yrs.

schemes.name: National Savings Certificates (VIII-Issue) Scheme
schemes.description: The scheme âNational Savings Certificates (VIII-Issue) Schemeâ was launched by the Department of Economic Affairs, Ministry of Finance, Government of India to promote a culture of long-term savings among individuals.

schemes.name: NBCFDC General Loan Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: A general loan scheme by the Ministry of Social Justice for Indian citizens from backward classes for various income-generating activities. Loan up to â¹15 Lakh per beneficiary for pursuing income-generating activities.
schemes.income_limit: The Total Annual Family Income of the applicant must be Less than â¹ 3 Lakh per Annum.

schemes.name: New Swarnima Scheme For Women
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: A term loan scheme by the Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment for women entrepreneurs from backward classes to obtain a loan of up to â¹2,00,000/- @ 5% per annum, thereby providing them social & financial security.
schemes.income_limit: The Total Annual **Family Income** of the Applicant must be Less than **â¹ 3 Lakh per Annum**

schemes.name: NPS Vatsalya Scheme
schemes.description: The âNPS Vatsalyaâ is a pension-cum-saving scheme designed for minors, regulated by PFRDA. It aims to secure the financial future of minors by offering a structured pension scheme, with contributions managed by a guardian until the minor turns 18.

schemes.name: NSAP - Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme
schemes.description: "Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme" is one of the five sub-schemes of the National Social Assistance Programme. Under IGNOAPS, citizens living Below Poverty Line and 60 years or above in age are eligible to apply. A monthly pension of â¹ 200 up to 79 years and â¹ 500 thereafter.

schemes.name: Pension Scheme for the Tappers in Small Rubber Plantations
schemes.description: The scheme âPension Scheme for the Tappers in Small Rubber Plantationsâ was launched by the Rubber Board, Ministry of Commerce & Industry, Government of India to motivate tappers and retain them in the tapping job.

schemes.name: Post Office Monthly Income Scheme
schemes.description: POMIS is an investment scheme recognized and validated by the Ministry of Finance. It is one of the highest-earning schemes with an interest rate of 6.6%. The interest in this scheme is disbursed monthly. After opening a POMIS account, individuals can invest a minimum amount of â¹1500.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojna (PMFBY)
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.description: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana was launched in  2016 with the aim to support farmers by providing an affordable comprehensive risk cover for crops.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana
schemes.description: A National Mission for Financial Inclusion (NMFI), namely, Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY) was launched by the Prime Minister across the country on 28th August, 2014. It envisages to provide  universal banking services for every unbanked adult in the country.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana
schemes.description: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY) is an insurance scheme offering life insurance cover for death due to any reason. It is a one-year cover, renewable from year to year. The scheme is offered by banks/post offices and administered through life insurance companies.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Maandhan Yojana
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
schemes.description: The scheme aims to provide old-age social security through a minimum assured monthly pension of â¹ 3,000/- to Small and Marginal Farmers after attaining the age of 60 years.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Kisan Samridhi Sah-yojana (PM-MKSSY): COMPONENT 1A: Formalization of Fisheries Sector and Facilitating Access of Fisheries Microenterprises to Government of India Programs for Working Capital Financing
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry of Fisheries,Animal Husbandry and Dairying
schemes.description: The scheme aims to formalise fisheries microenterprises and facilitate their access to institutional working capital finance through small grants and credit intermediaries. It benefits fisheries sector stakeholders registered on NFDP with verifiable credit needs and valid bank accounts.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Matsya Kisan Samridhi Sah-yojana (PM-MKSSY): COMPONENT 1B: One-Time Incentive for the Adoption of Aquaculture Insurance
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry of Fisheries,Animal Husbandry and Dairying
schemes.description: The Component 1B of PM-MKSSY provides a one-time incentive to eligible applicants who have availed institutional credit for fisheries-related activities. The objective is to encourage formal credit adoption and support the repayment capacity of fisheries microenterprises.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana
schemes.description: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana (PMMY) is  a flagship scheme of Government of India. It facilitates micro credit/Loan upto Rs. 20 lakhs to income generating micro enterprises engaged in the non farm sector in manufacturing, processing, trading or service sector including activities allied to agriculture

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana
schemes.description: An Accident Insurance Scheme offering accidental death and disability cover for death or disability on account of an accident.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Uchchatar Shiksha Protsahan Yojana: Central Sector Interest Subsidy Scheme
schemes.description: The scheme provides full interest subsidy during the moratorium period on loan availed under Model Education Loan Scheme of Indian Banksâ Association (IBA) to students belonging to economically weaker sections whose annual parental income is up to â¹4.5 Lakhs from all sources.
schemes.income_limit: The benefit of the Scheme is applicable to students belonging to economically weaker sections having gross parental/ family income up to â¹4.5 lakhs per annum from all sources.

schemes.name: Pradhan Mantri Vidyalaxmi (PM-Vidyalaxmi) Scheme
schemes.description: The "Pradhan Mantri Vidyalaxmi (Pm-vidyalaxmi) Scheme" aims to provide financial support for higher education through education loans. Under this scheme, financial assistance of up to â¹10,00,000/- is provided to meritorious students seeking admission to domestic institutions.
schemes.income_limit: - The applicant must have an annual family income of up to â¹8,00,000 to qualify for 3% interest subvention.

schemes.name: Pravasi Bharatiya Bima Yojana
schemes.description: A mandatory insurance scheme by Ministry of External Affairs (MEA) for safeguarding the interests of Indian emigrant workers falling under Emigration Check Required (ECR) category going for overseas employment to ECR countries.

schemes.name: Prime Minister's Employment Generation Programme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: Launched in August 2008, Prime Minister's Employment Generation Programme (PMEGP) is a credit-linked subsidy scheme, administered by the Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises (MSME). PMEGP aims to generate employment opportunities through the establishment of micro-enterprises in
schemes.income_limit: There will be no income ceiling for assistance in setting up projects under PMEGP.

schemes.name: Raw Material Assistance Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: Raw Material Assistance Scheme aims to help MSMEs by way of financing the purchase of Raw Material (Both indigenous & imported). This gives an opportunity to MSMEs to focus better on manufacturing quality products.

schemes.name: Scheme of Fund for Regeneration of Traditional Industries
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: To make the traditional industries more productive and competitive and facilitating their sustainable development, the Govt. of India announced in 2005-06, setting up of a fund for the regeneration of traditional industries. Pursuant to this announcement, a Central Sector Scheme titled the âSFURTI".

schemes.name: Scholarship Scheme for Girl Children of Jute Mills / MSMEs Workers
schemes.description: National Jute Board Act, 2008 provides to âsecure better working conditions and provisions and improve amenities and incentives for workers engaged in the jute industry.â

schemes.name: Senior Citizens Saving Scheme
schemes.description: Introduced in 2004 by the Govt. of India, SCSS offers a steady stream of income for individuals over 60 years old. As it is a government-backed scheme, there is minimal risk associated with SCSS. Individuals can apply for this scheme in post offices and public and private banks.

schemes.name: Single Point Registration Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: National Small Industries Corporation enlists Micro & Small Enterprises under Single Point Registration scheme for participation in Government Purchases. The units enlisted under this scheme of NSIC are eligible to get the benefits under Public Procurement Policy for Micro & Small Enterprises.

schemes.name: Skill Loan Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Skill Development And Entrepreneurship
schemes.description: A Skill loan scheme by Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship to provide loan upto Rs. 1,50,000 to student who has secured admission in a course run by Industrial Training Institutes (ITIs), Polytechnics or in a school recognized by Central or State education Boards or in a college affil

schemes.name: Stand-Up India
schemes.description: A scheme by Ministry of Finance for financing SC/ST and  Women Entrepreneurs by facilitating bank loans for setting up a greenfield project  Enterprise in manufacturing, services, trading sector and activities allied to agriculture.

schemes.name: Swatantrata Sainik Samman Pension Scheme
schemes.description: Launched on 15th August 1972, "Swatantrata Sainik Samman Pension Scheme" is a Pension Scheme by the Ministry of Home Affairs. The scheme provides the grant of pension to living freedom fighters and their families; if they are no more alive, and to the families or martyrs.

schemes.name: Term Loan Scheme of NMDFC
schemes.description: Under this scheme, credit of up to Rs. 20 lacs under Credit Line-1 and up to Rs. 30 lacs under Credit line -2 is extended to beneficiaries among minority communities at 6%  p.a. & 8% p.a. respectively for financing economically viable income generation ventures.
schemes.income_limit: b) The annual family income should not exceed: Rs.

schemes.name: Virasat Loan Scheme of NMDFC
schemes.description: Concessional credit of up to Rs.10.00  lacs can be availed under Credit Line-1 & 2.  to meet Working Capital  and Fixed Capital for purchase of equipment/tools/machineries/raw material by the Minority Artisan.
schemes.income_limit: b) The annual family income of the applicant shall not exceed: Rs.

schemes.name: Vocational Education and Training Loan Scheme
schemes.nodal_ministry: Ministry Of Social Justice and Empowerment
schemes.description: The Vocational Education and Training Loan Scheme provides financial assistance to youth of the target group to enhance their skills & employability.
